RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS DENNIS UNG and MELINDA HOANG's DEMURRER TO THE 4TH, 8TH AND 9TH CAUSES OF ACTION OF THE COMPLAINT - Sustained with ten days leave to amend as to fourth, eight and ninth causes of action No opposition filed.
